sections.title: Before having access to the Rogues' Den minigame

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Hi there, looking for a challenge are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes actually, what've you got?

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Shame, I don't think I have anything for you. Train up your Thieving skill to at least 50 and I might be able to help you out.

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Shame, I don't think I have anything for you. Train up your Agility skill to at least 50 and I might be able to help you out.

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Aha, I have the perfect thing for you! See if you can get to the centre of my maze, the further you get the greater the rewards. There's even some special prizes if you make it right to the end.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok that sounds good!

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Great! When you enter the maze, I'll give you a jewel - it'll allow you to get out of the maze at any time. However that's all you're allowed to take in with you, no cheating!

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Oh one last thing, if you happen to see my harmonica I'd really like to have it back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually I think I'll pass thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Ah welcome to my humble home, well actually it belongs to mummsie but she's getting on a bit so I look after the place for her.

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: So are you interested in a challenge?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

sections.title: After having access to the Rogues' Den minigame

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Hi again, what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to try the maze again!

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Certainly, when you enter the maze I'll give you another jewel. Good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing thanks.

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: And where do you think you're going? A little too eager I think. Come and talk to me before you go wandering around in there.

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Tut tut tut, now you know you're not allowed to take anything except that jewel in with you.

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Sorry but I can't allow you to take your follower in there, never know what trouble they might cause.

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Oh dear, you really didn't get very far did you?

sections.title: Getting caught by the rogue guards, hit by the moving spin-blade obstacles, or hit by any other less-dangerous obstacles except for the contortion bars

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Well you didn't do too badly, but you didn't make it nearly as far as others have.

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Amazing, you made it so far!

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Wow you even managed to get the prize, well done!

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Want to come out then? Giving up are you? You know there's no time limit here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I'd like to leave!

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Right you are then, out you come.

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Oh dear, you really didn't get very far did you?

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Well you didn't do too badly, but you didn't make it nearly as far as others have.

lines.speaker: Brian O'Richard
lines.text: Amazing, you made it so far!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I'm fine thanks.
